title: stale NOTE in WolfTpmSwtpm::connect implies manual sync needed
description: connection.rs:199 says 'Any bug fix to that function must also be applied here' but both WolfTpmSwtpm::connect and wolftpm::Device::open_swtpm now delegate to wolftpm_sys::swtpm::init_swtpm — there is no duplication to keep in sync. A future maintainer reading this NOTE will either (a) incorrectly duplicate a fix instead of updating the shared helper, or (b) waste time auditing two call sites that are already identical. The NOTE should be replaced with: 'Both delegate to wolftpm_sys::swtpm::init_swtpm; see that function for the setenv/init/unsetenv sequence.'
